name: CANstress CAPL Functions
title: CANstress CAPL Functions
description: Access Multiple CANstress Devices from a Single Test Module | CANstress and Distributed Mode | CANstress: Main Test Function Example
tables: CANSTRESS On the function page you can find an overview of available functions. To use the CAPL functions the CANstress_NL.dll must be included.
Starts the CANstress software and establishes a connection via the COM interface to this COM server.
Starts the CANstress software and establishes a connection to this COM server via the COM interface.
CANstressCreateServer(Device number) This function must be called before all other CANstress CAPL functions!
Starts the CANstress software and establishes a connection to this COM server via the COM interface.
Indicates the number of configured CANstress devices.
Establishes a connection between the CANstress software and the CANstress hardware.
Sends back the handle for the current CANstress device.
Delivers information about CANstress software and the connected CAN hardware.
Acquires the number of disturbances that were executed by CANstress.
Serves to query whether the CANstress hardware is in the state Finished.
Serves to query whether the CANstress hardware is in the state Idle.
Serves to query whether the CANstress hardware is in the state Pending.
Registers a CAPL function as callback that is called if CANstress is switched into the state Finished.
Registers a CAPL function as callback that is called if CANstress is switched into the state Idle.
Registers a CAPL function as callback that is called if CANstress is switched into the state Pending.
Sets the value of the Bus Timing Register.
Sets the Continuous disturbance (time limited) mode.
Sets the Continuous disturbance (until stop) mode.
Sets the Continuous disturbance (while trigger) mode.
Defines the active device for further functions.
Sets the Limited number of disturbances disturbance mode.
Sets the value of a resistor for analog disturbances.
Sets the message ID, which will activate the trigger.
Sets a range for message IDs, which will activate triggers.
Sets the Unlimited number of disturbances disturbance mode.
Orders the CANstress COM server to activate the hardware for the error disturbance activity.
Orders the CANstress COM server to end the current disturbance activity of the hardware.
Deactivates the CANstress software triggers if this is still active.
Waits until the CANstress hardware is in the state Finished.
Waits until the CANstress hardware is in the state Idle.
Waits until the CANstress hardware is in the state Pending.
